## Summary

What does this PR change, and why?

<!-- If it resolves an open issue, link it here, e.g. "Closes #12" -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal change
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `ruff format .` applied
- [ ] `mypy src/` passes (strict)
- [ ] `pytest` passes, with tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] Docs and/or `CHANGELOG.md` updated where relevant

## Notes for reviewers

Anything worth calling out — tricky decisions, follow-ups, things you're unsure
about.
